title: Halloween Pick and Mix Candy Jelly Sweets for Kids and Adults (100g, Worms)
features: Delightful Assortment: Indulge in a delectable mix of jellies, gummies, and other confectionery delights, perfect for Halloween festivities.
Kid-Friendly Treats: Crafted with care, these sweets cater to children's tastes while ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience.
Festive Packaging: Presented in a vibrant, Halloween-themed package, adding a touch of spooky charm to your celebrations.
Shareable Portions: With generous portions, this pick and mix candy is ideal for sharing among friends and family during parties or trick-or-treating.
Long-Lasting Enjoyment: With a variety of textures and flavours, this assortment promises to satisfy sweet cravings throughout the Halloween season.
description: Product description Indulge in the spooky delight of our Halloween Pick and Mix Candy Jelly Sweet, perfect for kids and adults alike! This assortment of tantalising jellies comes in an array of ghoulish shapes and flavours, making it the ultimate treat for your Halloween celebrations in 2024. From gummy ghosts to sour worms, each bite promises a burst of fruity and sugary goodness that will have you craving for more. Whether you're hosting a haunted house party or simply want to add a touch of Halloween magic to your snack time, this pick and mix is sure to be a hit. Packaged in a festive container, it's an easy and convenient way to indulge in the spooky spirit of the season. Gather your friends and family, and let the Halloween fun begin with our deliciously spooky candy jelly sweet! Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Gelatine (Pork), Maltodextrin, Acid (Citric Acid), Flavouring, Vegetable Concentrate (Black carrot), Vegetable oil (Coconut), Glazing agents (Carnauba wax). Directions Suitable for all ages. Enjoy as a shareable 100g portion. Chew carefully to avoid choking hazard. See more
